name: 12qt Stainless Steel Stock Pot Silver - Figmint™
description:
Making homemade stocks or soups is easy with this 12-Quart Stainless Steel Stock Pot from Figmint™. Featuring an aluminum core fully surrounded by two layers of stainless steel for quick and even heat distribution, this silver-finish stock pot can be used with all utensil types, from wood to silicone to stainless steel. The pot is induction, gas and electric stove compatible and comes with a clear lid, and it's also oven safe up to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure everyday.
